name: FactSet FQL Price-Series Dictionary (sample)
description: Sample FQL formula dictionary for pulling clean daily price/volume time series and point-in-time reference data from FactSet via the FDS() Excel function. Indicators are NOT pulled here; they are computed in-app (Tab 3).

price.label: Daily closing price
price.notes: Closing price time series. start/end accept relative (-2Y, 0D) or explicit dates; freq D=daily.

adv_usd_20d.label: 20-day average daily value traded (USD)
adv_usd_20d.notes: 20-day average daily traded value in USD as of {end}.

index_weight.label: Index weight in benchmark
index_weight.notes: Constituent weight in the specified benchmark index.

next_earnings.label: Next earnings/event date
next_earnings.notes: Next scheduled earnings/event date for event-calendar flagging.
